perf_hint: a few noise octaves inside the fire band and almost nothing above it, so frame time is dominated by the resolution — the band itself is cheap

params.name: height
params.description: How high the resting fire band reaches, as a fraction of the frame.

params.name: stoke
params.description: How much higher the kick makes the flames lick.

params.name: billow
params.description: How tightly the flame noise billows.

params.name: rise
params.description: How fast the flames climb through the band.

params.name: flicker
params.description: How restless the flame tips are.

params.name: sparks
params.description: How many embers detach and drift up, twinkling with the air band.

params.name: warmth
params.description: How far up the palette the hottest flame reaches.

params.name: brightness
params.description: How much light the loudness of the song puts into the fire.
